title: More than 100 Biopharmas Increase Impactful Engagement with Veeva CRM Events Management
text: Integrated platform drives compliant interactions across virtual, in-person, and hybrid global events PLEASANTON, Calif. , March 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems (NYSE: VEEV) today announced more than 100 life sciences companies are using Veeva CRM Events Management to plan and execute in-person, virtual, and hybrid events worldwide.

title: Got $1,500? You Can Confidently Add These 3 Stocks to Your Portfolio
text: Veeva is a major (and growing) cloud-based software provider to the life sciences industry. Booking Holdings is close to booking a billion room nights annually via its many services.

title: A Bull Market Is Coming: 1 Excellent Growth Stock to Buy Now
text: Veeva Systems provides cloud services for biotechnology companies. It helps them navigate the ins and outs of the product regulatory process.

title: Better Cloud Stock: Salesforce vs. Veeva Systems
text: Salesforce plans to focus on expanding its operating margins as its revenue growth cools off this year. Veeva's revenue growth is also cooling off, but it doesn't plan to aggressively cut costs to strengthen its slipping margins.

title: Veeva Q4 Earnings: Another Solid Quarter In The Books
text: Veeva posted a stronger than expected quarter, with revenue growth and EPS beating expectations. Veeva's plans to decouple from Salesforce will give them more room to innovate in the future.

title: Is Veeva Systems a Good Stock to Buy Now?
text: The life science industry's favorite cloud software provider recently exceeded expectations, but its forward outlook was softer than hoped.

title: Veeva Systems (VEEV) Q4 Earnings Beat, Margins Decline
text: Veeva Systems' (VEEV) Q4 results reflect impressive performances by both segments.

title: Veeva (VEEV) Reports Q4 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Veeva (VEEV) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended January 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Veeva Systems, Inc. (VEEV) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Veeva Systems, Inc. (NYSE:VEEV ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call March 1, 2023 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Ato Garrett - Investor Relations Peter Gassner - Founder and CEO Paul Shawah - Executive Vice President, Strategy Brent Bowman - CFO Conference Call Participants Brent Bracelin - Piper Sandler Brian Peterson - Raymond James Joe Vruwink - Baird Ken Wong - Oppenheimer Anne Samuel - JPMorgan Stephanie Davis - SVB Securities Craig Hettenbach - Morgan Stanley Rishi Jaluria - RBC Capital Markets Saket Kalia - Barclays Dylan Becker - William Blair Charles Rhyee - Cowen Ryan MacDonald - Needham & Company Joe Goodwin - JMP Securities Stan Berenshteyn - Wells Fargo Securities Jack Wallace - Guggenheim Securities Ato Garrett Good afternoon, and welcome to Veeva's Fiscal 2023 Fourth Quarter and Full-Year Earnings Conference Call for the quarter and year ended January 31, 2023. As a reminder, we posted prepared remarks on Veeva's Investor Relations website just after 1:00 p.m.

title: Veeva Systems (VEEV) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Veeva (VEEV) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.58% and 2.03%, respectively, for the quarter ended January 2023. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Veeva Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2023 Results
text: Fiscal Year 2023 Total Revenues of $2,155.1M, up 16% Year Over Year;  Q4 Total Revenues of $563.4M, up 16% Year Over Year Fiscal Year 2023 Subscription Services Revenues of $1,733.0M, up 17% Year Over Year;  Q4 Subscription Services Revenues of $460.2M, up 16% Year Over Year PLEASANTON, Calif. , March 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Veeva Systems Inc. (NYSE: VEEV), a leading provider of industry cloud solutions for the global life sciences industry, today announced results for its fourth quarter and fiscal year ended January 31, 2023.
